summary.lv: AvaFin meklē Data Engineer ar streaming sistēmu pieredzi, kas pārvaldīs reālā laika datu plūsmu no avota sistēmām uz datu ezeru — CDC pipeline ar Debezium, Kafka topic dizains un Spark Streaming darbi.
summary.en: AvaFin is hiring a Data Engineer with streaming-systems background to own the real-time data path from source systems to the data lake — CDC pipelines with Debezium, Kafka topic design and Spark Streaming jobs.
